zh.lifeSummary: 當Ann Kennedy於大約1632年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾奧爾尼時，她的父親Thomas Kennedy of Ardmillan55歲，母親Marion Crauford48歲。她於大約1650年與Jeremiah Seymour在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1694年10月8日在她的家鄉享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯。

nameMeanings.name: Kennedy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceannéidigh ‘descendant of Ceannéidigh’ (from ceann ‘head’ + éidigh ‘ugly’); or from the Scottish Gaelic Mac Cinnèidigh, consisting of mac ‘son’ with an equivalent name. Compare Canaday , Cannady , Cannedy , Kannady , and Kenedy .

History: Kennedy ancestral lands are found both in Ireland and in Scotland, where the family's medieval ancestral seat is sited on the Ayrshire coast, facing the Irish Sea. — The great-grandparents of President John Fitzgerald Kennedy (1917–63) came to North America as immigrants from Ireland in the 1840s. His paternal great-grandparents were Patrick Kennedy (1823–58), born in Dunganstown, County Wexford, Ireland, and Bridget Murphy, who was born probably in Owenduff, County Wexford, Ireland c. 1827; they came to Boston, MA, in 1849. His maternal great-grandparents were Thomas Fitzgerald (1823–85), who was born in Bruff, County Limerick, Ireland, and Rose Anna Cox, who was born probably in Tomregan or Kinawley, County Cavan, Ireland, c. 1835; they came to Boston, MA, in 1857. — An early Scottish Kennedy forebear of a quite different family was British colonial official Archibald Kennedy (1685–1763), the son of Alexander Kennedy of Craigoch, who emigrated to NY c. 1710.

meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Ann Kennedy was born about 1632, in Olney, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Thomas Kennedy of Ardmillan, was 55 and her mother, Marion Crauford, was 48. She married Jeremiah Seymour about 1650, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 8 October 1694, in her hometown, at the age of 63, and was buried in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ann Kennedy est née environ 1632, à Olney, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Kennedy of Ardmillan, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Marion Crauford, avait 48 ans. Elle a épousé Jeremiah Seymour environ 1650, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 8 octobre 1694, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ann Kennedyが約1632年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアオルニーで生まれた時，父Thomas Kennedy of Ardmillanは55歳，母Marion Craufordは48歳であった。約1650年にイギリスイギリスでJeremiah Seymourと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1694年10月8日に故郷で63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアミルトン ケインスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ann Kennedy(이)가 대략 1632년 영국 벅잉함실르 니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Kennedy of Ardmillan(은)는 55세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marion Crauford(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 대략 1650년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Jeremiah Seymour(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1694년 10월 8일 그녀의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 미턴 케인스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Kennedy nasceu aproximadamente 1632, em Olney, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Kennedy of Ardmillan, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Marion Crauford, tinha 48 anos. Ela casou-se com Jeremiah Seymour aproximadamente 1650, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 8 de outubro de 1694, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ann Kennedy родилась около 1632 г. в местности олни, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Kennedy of Ardmillan было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Marion Crauford, 48. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jeremiah Seymour около 1650 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 8 октября 1694 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности милтон кинесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
